== Notes for [[Item:Q2508|Q2508]] ==

RESEARCH NOTES:
<p>King of the Hittites 1380-1358 BCE</p>
<p>Hattusili II</p>
<p>From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia
 [[Category:Possibly derived from wikipedia]] 
 
 </p>
<p>Hattusili II was a king of the Hittite Empire (New kingdom) in the early 14th century BC.</p>
<p>His existence is disputed.</p>
<p>Preceded by:</p>
<p>Tudhaliya II Hittite king Succeeded by:</p>
<p>Tudhaliya III</p>
<p>SOURCE NOTES:</p>
<p>http://www.american-pictures.com/genealogy/persons/per00733.htm#0</p>

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
6708FF25A66B31EFBBFD9A22EF79916B9C2A


[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
